Ethereum Price Up on April 22 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum traded at $2,403.78 on April 22, 2026 (9:15 a.m. ET), marking a $98.74 daily increase from April 21's $2,305.04, confirming a short-term price rise amid neutral-to-bullish technical signals.[1][5]  
Bitcoin stood at $78,194.37 on April 22, up from $75,901.41 on April 21, supporting broader market strength.[1][5]
